CVE-2021-44482.title: An issue was discovered in YottaDB through r1.32 and V7.0-000. A  ...
CVE-2021-44482.description: An issue was discovered in YottaDB through r1.32 and V7.0-000. A lack of input validation in calls to do_verify in sr_unix/do_verify.c allows attackers to attempt to jump to a NULL pointer by corrupting a function pointer.
